items.title: PSG's Hakimi to face trial after rape allegation
items.description: Paris St-Germain defender Achraf Hakimi says he is set to face trial after an allegation of rape was made against him.

items.title: Nancy Guthrie's family offers $1m reward to bring home missing mother
items.description: Fighting back tears, the missing woman's NBC host daughter says they accept she may be dead.

items.title: Why Champions League return is crucial to Man Utd
items.description: Up to fourth in the Premier League after Monday's win at Everton, Champions League qualification would be a big boost to Manchester United's finances ...

items.title: BBC edited a second racial slur out of Bafta ceremony
items.description: The BBC's chief content officer Kate Phillips says a slur that aired was the result of a genuine error.
